notes: Day 21 (Mar 20 = NOWRUZ) UPDATE 4:15AM ET. Sources: CNN D20, AJ liveblog D20, ToI liveblog D20, CNBC, AP, Bloomberg, Fortune, OilPrice.com, NPR, NBC, Wikipedia, Investing.com, IAEA, Euronews, NCRI, Iran International, Carnegie, Windward, PBS, UNHCR, Zelenskyy statement.

CHAHARSHANBE SURI — NIGHT OF DEFIANCE: NCRI reports Chaharshanbe Suri (fire festival, eve of last Wednesday before Nowruz) turned into NATIONWIDE act of defiance. Regime deployed massive security but protests erupted anyway. 'Death to Mojtaba' chants heard from homes. Ministry of Intelligence: 111 'pro-monarchy cells' arrested in 26 of 31 provinces overnight. IRGC attempting to convert celebrations into mourning for Ali Khamenei — population REJECTING this. Carnegie: largest potential uprising since 1979 revolution. War + Nowruz + succession crisis = triple internal pressure.

OMAN PORTS HIT — NEW GEOGRAPHIC ESCALATION: Several drones struck Oman's ports of Duqm and Salalah, damaging at least one fuel storage tank. Oman has been relatively neutral — this represents expansion of IRGC targeting to previously uninvolved state. D21 revised UP: 35→40 missiles, 65→72 drones to reflect Oman theater.

SAMREF REFINERY HIT — IRGC NAMED TARGET EXECUTED: Saudi Arabia confirmed drone hit SAMREF refinery in Yanbu on Red Sea coast — Saudi Aramco/ExxonMobil JV. SAMREF was specifically NAMED by IRGC on D19. Target scorecard: Kuwait 2 refineries ✓, Qatar LNG ✓, SAMREF ✓. Remaining: Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn.

SELECTIVE HORMUZ PASSAGE EMERGING: China, India, Pakistan, Turkey getting ships through via bilateral negotiations with Iran. March 16: only 2 crossings (97% below normal). ~400 vessels waiting in Gulf of Oman. Iran still exporting 16M+ barrels to China since March. Permission-based transit framework crystallizing.
200+ UKRAINIAN ANTI-DRONE EXPERTS deployed to Gulf states (Zelenskyy confirmed). Operational expertise from Russia-Ukraine war applied to Iranian drone defense.
OIL VOLATILE: D20 Brent spiked to $119.11 intraday (CNBC) before settling ~$114 close. D21 (Nowruz): ~$110 in overnight/early trading. Range $108-$112. Citi: $120+ near-term. EIA: >$95 next 2 months.
3.2 MILLION IRANIANS DISPLACED (UNHCR). HRANA: 3,114 documented dead. Health Ministry: 1,444 + 18,551 injured. Internet blackout ~270+ hours (characterized as 'a third of 2026 offline').
LEBANON ~1,000+ KILLED: Health Ministry (D19): 968 killed, 2,432 wounded. Now crossing 1,000. 1M+ displaced. Litani bridges destroyed. Ground ops continue.

IRAN REJECTS ALL DIPLOMACY: Araghchi: 'never asked for ceasefire, never asked for negotiation.' Senior official: 'no scenario.' Macron energy moratorium call continues. Trump South Pars trigger active.

theoryBox: Day 21 — NOWRUZ: DEFIANCE + OMAN EXPANSION + TARGET LIST: Chaharshanbe Suri turned 'Night of Defiance' — nationwide protests despite crackdown. 111 pro-monarchy cells arrested in 26/31 provinces. 'Death to Mojtaba' chants. NEW: Oman ports (Duqm, Salalah) hit — war expanding to neutral states. SAMREF ✓ on Red Sea. Target scorecard 4/7. Selective Hormuz: China/India/Turkey getting ships through. Brent ~$110 (pulled back from $119 spike). 3.2M Iranians displaced. 200+ Ukrainian drone experts in Gulf. Iran FM: 'never asked for ceasefire.' Carnegie: largest uprising potential since 1979.
theoryBox_fa: روز ۲۱ — نوروز: نافرمانی + عمان + لیست اهداف: چهارشنبه‌سوری = شب نافرمانی. ۱۱۱ سلول بازداشت. 'مرگ بر مجتبی.' عمان (دقم، صلاله) حمله — گسترش. سامرف ✓. ۴ از ۷. هرمز گزینشی: چین/هند/ترکیه. نفت ~۱۱۰. ۳.۲ میلیون آواره. اوکراین ۲۰۰+ متخصص. عراقچی: 'هرگز.' کارنگی: ۱۹۷۹.

metrics.label: Day
metrics.desc: NOWRUZ — CHAHARSHANBE SURI DEFIANCE. 111 arrests in 26/31 provinces. 'Death to Mojtaba.' Oman ports hit (Duqm, Salalah) = new theater. SAMREF ✓. 4/7 targets. Internet ~270+ hrs. 3.2M displaced.

metrics.label: Cumul. missiles
metrics.desc: D21 REVISED UP: 35→40 (Oman Duqm/Salalah added). D20: 45 (SAMREF + 6th salvo). Oman = NEW theater — IRGC targeting neutral states. Target list execution continues.

metrics.label: Cumul. drones
metrics.desc: D21 REVISED UP: 65→72 (Oman ports confirmed). IRGC drone range now proven: Gulf + Red Sea + Oman. Three coasts. 200+ Ukrainian anti-drone experts deployed to Gulf.

metrics.label: Brent crude
metrics.desc: D20 spiked $119.11 intraday (CNBC), settled ~$114. D21 overnight pullback to ~$108-112. Citi: $120+. EIA: >$95 next 2 months. Oman + SAMREF + Kuwait + Qatar = supply crunch persists. Selective Hormuz passage NOT reducing anxiety.

metrics.label: Iran dead (Hengaw)
metrics.desc: No new Hengaw report. HRANA documented: 3,114. Health Ministry: 1,444 + 18,551 injured. UNHCR: 3.2M displaced. Internet ~270+ hrs. Chaharshanbe Suri protests = additional risk. 25 hospitals damaged, 9 out of service.

metrics.label: Lebanon
metrics.desc: Health Ministry (D19): 968 killed, 2,432 wounded. Now crossing 1,000 with D20-D21 strikes. 1M+ displaced (19% pop). Litani bridges destroyed. Ground ops expanding.

metrics.label: Israel dead
metrics.desc: 6th missile salvo since midnight D20. Cluster munitions continue. 3,727+ wounded. Interceptor crisis persists. 200+ US wounded (180+ returned to duty).

metrics.label: Nuclear risk
metrics.desc: IAEA: 440kg at 60% = ~10 weapons. Isfahan underground status unknown. E3: 'increasing risk of diversion.' Iran rejects ALL diplomacy. Kent (resigned): 'Iran not on verge of nuclear weapon.' Contradicts E3 assessment.

metrics_fa.desc: نوروز — چهارشنبه‌سوری نافرمانی. ۱۱۱ بازداشت. 'مرگ بر مجتبی.' عمان حمله. ۳.۲ میلیون آواره.

metrics_fa.desc: D21 بازنگری ۴۰. عمان = تئاتر جدید. سامرف + لیست.

metrics_fa.desc: D21 بازنگری ۷۲. عمان + دریای سرخ + خلیج = سه ساحل. اوکراین ۲۰۰+ متخصص.

metrics_fa.label: نفت
metrics_fa.desc: D20 جهش ۱۱۹. D21 عقب‌نشینی ۱۰۸-۱۱۲. سیتی: ۱۲۰+. هرمز گزینشی = کاهش نه.

metrics_fa.label: کشته ایران
metrics_fa.desc: HRANA: ۳,۱۱۴. وزارت: ۱,۴۴۴. UNHCR: ۳.۲ میلیون. اینترنت ۲۷۰+. چهارشنبه‌سوری اعتراض.

metrics_fa.label: لبنان
metrics_fa.desc: وزارت: ۹۶۸ + ادامه. پل‌های لیطانی. ۱ میلیون آواره.

metrics_fa.label: خطر هسته‌ای
metrics_fa.desc: IAEA: ۱۰ سلاح. کنت: 'در آستانه نه.' E3: 'انحراف.' شفافیت = صفر.

sitrep: CHAHARSHANBE SURI — NIGHT OF DEFIANCE: Chaharshanbe Suri (fire festival, eve of Nowruz) turned into nationwide protest. NCRI: 'far bigger than a family celebration — a vivid display of public anger, cultural resilience, and organized resistance.' Regime deployed massive security forces but protests erupted anyway. 'Death to Mojtaba' chants from homes. Ministry of Intelligence: 111 'pro-monarchy cells' arrested overnight in 26 of 31 provinces. IRGC attempting to transform celebrations into mourning for Ali Khamenei — population REJECTING this narrative. Carnegie Endowment: largest potential uprising since 1979 revolution. War + Nowruz + succession crisis = regime facing TWO fronts.

OMAN PORTS HIT — NEW GEOGRAPHIC EXPANSION: Several drones struck Oman's ports of Duqm and Salalah, damaging at least one fuel storage tank. CRITICAL: Oman has been NEUTRAL throughout conflict. This represents IRGC targeting expanding beyond belligerent/allied states. Oman = key alternative shipping hub. If Oman route compromised: Gulf states lose another bypass option. War now spans: Gulf + Red Sea + Oman Sea + Caspian = ALL of Iran's surrounding maritime space.

SAMREF REFINERY HIT — IRGC NAMED TARGET EXECUTED: Saudi Arabia confirmed drone struck SAMREF refinery in Yanbu on Red Sea coast (Saudi Aramco/ExxonMobil JV, ~400K bbl/day capacity). SAMREF was SPECIFICALLY NAMED by IRGC as target on D19. Target execution scorecard: Kuwait Mina al-Ahmadi ✓, Kuwait Mina Abdullah ✓, Qatar several LNG ✓, SAMREF ✓. Remaining named: Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn. Red Sea coast reached = East-West Pipeline bypass compromised.

SELECTIVE HORMUZ PASSAGE FRAMEWORK: China, India, Pakistan, Turkey negotiating bilateral passage with Iran. March 16: only 2 crossings (Windward), 97% below normal. ~400 vessels waiting in Gulf of Oman. Iran exporting 16M+ barrels to China since March — Beijing largest buyer. Iran using Kooh Mobarak terminal to bypass Hormuz for its own exports. Permission-based framework crystallizing: allies get passage, US-aligned blocked.

OIL VOLATILE — BRENT ~$110: D20 spiked $119.11 intraday (CNBC), settled ~$114 close. D21 overnight pullback to ~$108-112. Citi maintains $120+ near-term. EIA: >$95/b next 2 months, <$80 Q3 if conflict ends. Oman hits + SAMREF + Kuwait + Qatar = cascading supply crunch. Russia BENEFITING — energy windfall from paralyzed Gulf exports.

200+ UKRAINIAN ANTI-DRONE EXPERTS: Zelenskyy confirmed deployment to Gulf states. Operational expertise from Russia-Ukraine war applied to Iranian drone defense. First major non-NATO military assistance to Gulf. Potential game-changer for Gulf air defense if sustained.

IRAN: 3.2 MILLION DISPLACED (UNHCR). HRANA: 3,114 documented dead. Health Ministry: 1,444 + 18,551 injured. 25 hospitals damaged, 9 out of service. Internet blackout ~270+ hours ('a third of 2026 offline'). CENTCOM: 7,800+ targets. 25 provinces under bombardment. Chaharshanbe Suri defiance = population NOT broken despite 3 weeks of bombing.

NOWRUZ — WAR ENTERS 4TH WEEK: Mojtaba Khamenei STILL NOT SEEN — only written statements read by TV anchor. Leaked audio (Telegraph): 'minor leg injury,' survived by stepping outside minutes before strike. Some sources: injuries prevent traditional Nowruz message. If absent today: strongest signal of incapacitation. Pahlavi calls solidarity.

IRAN REJECTS ALL DIPLOMACY: FM Araghchi: 'never asked for ceasefire, never asked for negotiation.' Senior official: 'no scenario for ceasefire.' Time: 'US Must Be Held Accountable.' Macron energy moratorium = first framework but IRGC rejects restraint. Trump South Pars trigger = next Qatar attack → US destroys entire field.

LEBANON ~1,000+ KILLED: Health Ministry (D19): 968 killed, 2,432 wounded. Crossing 1,000 with continued strikes. 1M+ displaced (19% pop). Litani bridges destroyed. Ground ops expanding. German chancellor: 'error.'

KENT RESIGNATION AFTERMATH: Former NCTC director: 'no intelligence' of imminent Iranian attack. Iran 'not on verge of nuclear weapon.' Felt Israel pulled US into conflict. Contradicts administration narrative. FBI investigation opened.
sitrep_fa: چهارشنبه‌سوری = شب نافرمانی. NCRI: 'خشم عمومی، مقاومت فرهنگی.' ۱۱۱ سلول بازداشت ۲۶ استان. 'مرگ بر مجتبی.' کارنگی: ۱۹۷۹. سپاه دو جبهه.
عمان حمله — دقم + صلاله. بی‌طرف بود. گسترش. خلیج + دریای سرخ + عمان + خزر.
سامرف ✓ (ینبع). لیست: کویت ✓ قطر ✓ سامرف ✓. جبیل، مسیعید، الحصن باقی.
هرمز گزینشی: چین، هند، ترکیه. ۲ عبور روزانه. ۴۰۰ کشتی منتظر. ایران ۱۶+ میلیون بشکه به چین.
نفت ~۱۱۰. D20 جهش ۱۱۹. سیتی: ۱۲۰+. عمان + سامرف = بحران عرضه. روسیه سود.
اوکراین ۲۰۰+ متخصص ضدپهپاد در خلیج. زلنسکی تأیید.
ایران: ۳.۲ میلیون آواره. HRANA: ۳,۱۱۴. اینترنت ۲۷۰+. ۲۵ بیمارستان. چهارشنبه‌سوری = شکست نخورده.
نوروز: مجتبی هنوز ندیده. تلگراف: 'پای زخمی.' پهلوی: همبستگی.

dailySeries.sourceLabel: D1-D10: JPost. D11: UAE MoD. D12-D21: fragment est. D21 REVISED UP: Oman ports (Duqm, Salalah) hit — new theater. SAMREF ✓ (D20). Target list 4/7. Chaharshanbe Suri defiance. 200+ Ukrainian experts.

oil.note: Full daily series. D21 (NOWRUZ): Brent ~$110 — pulled back from D20's $119.11 intraday spike (CNBC). D20 settled ~$114. Overnight volatile $108-112 range. Oman ports hit = new supply anxiety on top of SAMREF + Kuwait + Qatar. Citi: $120+ near-term. EIA: >$95/b next 2 months. Russia BENEFITING from paralyzed Gulf exports. Selective Hormuz: China/India/Turkey getting passage. WTI ~$95. ~400 vessels waiting in Gulf of Oman. Iran exporting 16M+ bbl to China via Kooh Mobarak bypass.

latestTargetBreakdown.note: Mar 20 (D21) REVISED estimate. NOWRUZ + Chaharshanbe Suri defiance. OMAN ADDED — Duqm + Salalah = new theater. SAMREF aftermath. Continued Gulf + Israel attacks. Iran FM: no ceasefire ever.

dailyRows.primary: All-theater: UAE (Al Dhafra, Dubai airport, Palm Jumeirah), Israel (Tel Aviv, Haifa), Saudi (Ras Tanura), Qatar (Al Udeid), Kuwait, Bahrain, Jordan
dailyRows.capability: Operation Roaring Lion / True Promise IV launched within hours. 480 ballistic missiles + 720 drones on D1. Fastest Iranian response ever — suggests pre-positioned C2.
dailyRows.cost: Khamenei killed. IRIS Dena sunk by US submarine off Sri Lanka. Brent $72 (+$7). Hormuz shipping halted immediately — 150 ships stalled.
dailyRows.assessment: Overwhelming opening salvo. Iran distributing fire across 13 countries to overwhelm defenses.

dailyRows.primary: Peak launch day. UAE heaviest target. Israel: 124 injured from 10-warhead ballistic missile at Tel Aviv.
dailyRows.capability: 520 missiles + 850 drones — highest single-day volume. Iran expending stockpile rapidly.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $79.45 (CNBC). Iran state media confirms Khamenei family killed. Assembly of Experts emergency session. Jebel Ali Port fire, AWS data center hit.
dailyRows.assessment: Peak fury. Iran burning through inventory at unsustainable rate.

dailyRows.primary: Kuwait (6 US KIA at Shuaiba Port operations center), Bahrain, Saudi (US Embassy Riyadh drones), Israel (Hezbollah joins)
dailyRows.capability: 400+530. Kuwaiti F/A-18 friendly-fire shoots down 3 US F-15Es (all 6 crew survive). Hezbollah opens second front.
dailyRows.cost: 6 US KIA — first American combat deaths. Brent ~$83. Qatar arrests 10 IRGC cell operatives.
dailyRows.assessment: War expands. US casualties mount. Hezbollah + Iraqi militias = multi-front.

dailyRows.primary: Nuclear sites: Natanz entrance destroyed, Isfahan, Fordow access roads hit, Arak targeted
dailyRows.capability: 350+480. Declining from peak but still massive. Coalition strikes nuclear infrastructure.
dailyRows.cost: IAEA confirms Natanz inaccessible. Enrichment stockpile unverified 8+ months. Humanitarian crisis emerging.
dailyRows.assessment: Nuclear dimension activated. Escalation risk from enrichment uncertainty.

dailyRows.primary: Hezbollah long-range missile at Tel Aviv. Israel 250+ strikes on Lebanon. IRIS Dena confirmed sunk.
dailyRows.capability: 250+350. Clear decline. Senate rejects war powers resolution. CSIS: first 100 hours = $3.7B.
dailyRows.cost: Lebanon front fully active. Brent ~$90. Senate gives Trump political cover.
dailyRows.assessment: Decline accelerating. Political constraints loosening domestically.

dailyRows.primary: Qatar (14 ballistic + 4 drones per MoD), Kuwait, Bahrain, UAE
dailyRows.capability: 150+220. Fars claims >500 missiles, ~2,000 drones cumul. Rate ↓69% missiles, ↓74% drones.
dailyRows.cost: Brent ~$92. IEA triggers largest coordinated SPR release in history (400M bbl). War cost ~$2B/day.
dailyRows.assessment: Iran's ballistic capability declining structurally. Economic war intensifying.

dailyRows.primary: Continued Gulf + Israel harassment. Iraq: PMF HQs struck across multiple provinces.
dailyRows.capability: 100+160. Rate ↓79% missiles. >60% of Iranian launchers neutralized. 43 naval vessels destroyed.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $92.69 (CNBC). VLCC freight rates approaching records. Ruwais refinery shut (922K bbl/day offline).
dailyRows.assessment: Iran losing conventional capability. Asymmetric phase beginning.

dailyRows.primary: Diminished volume across Gulf. Iraq militia attacks intensify. F-35 shoots down Iranian Yak-130 — first F-35 air-to-air kill.
dailyRows.capability: 70+110. Rate ↓85%. Red Crescent: 65 schools, 32 medical facilities damaged.
dailyRows.cost: Brent intraday volatility. IEA Oil Market Report: 'largest supply disruption in history.' 20 Mb/d offline. Iran internet blackout persists.
dailyRows.assessment: Conventional campaign near-spent. Iran shifting to economic leverage.

dailyRows.primary: UAE MoD cumul: 1,422 UAVs detected (1,342 intercepted). All 8 cruise missiles intercepted.
dailyRows.capability: 50+80. Rate ↓90%. UAE air defenses showing strain but holding.
dailyRows.cost: Brent hits $119.50 — 52-week high (Investing.com). IEA: 'within whisker of $120.' Then crashes on SPR release news. Extreme volatility.
dailyRows.assessment: Oil price spike signals market panic. SPR intervention buys temporary relief.

dailyRows.primary: Mojtaba Khamenei designated new Supreme Leader by Assembly of Experts. NATO intercepts 2nd missile over Turkey.
dailyRows.capability: 40+60. Rate ↓92%. Trump claims war 'very complete, pretty much.' Then backtracks.
dailyRows.cost: Brent crashes to $88.43 (CNBC) — post-SPR selloff. EIA settles $94. Turkey deploys F-16s to N. Cyprus. 10,000+ civilian sites damaged in Iran.
dailyRows.assessment: Political transition in Iran. Conventional capability near-exhausted but regime intact.

dailyRows.primary: UAE reports continued intercepts. Gulf state coordination improving. Iraq: 300+ militia attacks cumul since D1.
dailyRows.capability: 27+81 (scaled from UAE MoD). Missile launches at lowest sustained level. Drones maintaining higher volume — cheaper, harder to suppress.
dailyRows.cost: Brent ~$91. Trump signals drawdown but Pentagon contradicts. Mixed messages on endgame.
dailyRows.assessment: Drone-missile divergence: missiles near-depleted but drone harassment continues at meaningful level.

dailyRows.primary: UAE MoD: 13 missiles (6 ballistic + 7 cruise) + 39 drones intercepted (official). Bahrain airport drones + fuel tanks fire. Ship hit in Hormuz.
dailyRows.capability: UAE cumul: 268 ballistic + 15 cruise + 1,514 UAVs. Fortune: Brent $90.96 AM. Drone attacks on airports emerging as pattern.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $91.98 close (CNBC). UKMTO: 16+ ships attacked cumul. Container ship fire in Hormuz.
dailyRows.assessment: Low-volume but high-disruption attacks on civilian infrastructure.

dailyRows.primary: Bahrain airport hit. Kuwait airport targeted. Dubai explosions. Abu Dhabi old airport fire. Container ship attacked near Jebel Ali.
dailyRows.capability: 8+40. KC-135 Stratotanker crashes western Iraq — 6 US KIA (total now 13). 4th US aircraft lost. Iran militias claim credit.
dailyRows.cost: Brent first >$100 close: $100.46 (CNBC). Fortune AM: $99.84. French CWO Frion killed near Erbil — first non-US allied death.
dailyRows.assessment: US losses mounting. Oil breaking $100 sustainably. French casualty internationalizes war.

dailyRows.primary: New Supreme Leader Khamenei first statement (written only — no video). Vows Hormuz stays closed. 3 more ships struck. Kuwait power lines hit by debris.
dailyRows.capability: 10+30. CENTCOM: 6,000+ US targets struck. 90+ Iranian vessels destroyed. Ballistic ↓86% from D1. UNSC Res 2817 condemns Iran 13-0-2.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $99.32 (CNBC). Khamenei statement fuels speculation on injuries. $10M bounty on Khamenei. State Dept: 'likely disfigured.'
dailyRows.assessment: Khamenei's absence and written-only statement suggests serious injuries. IRGC operating autonomously.

dailyRows.primary: UAE 9 ballistic + 33 drones intercepted (AJ). Qatar 4 ballistic + drones. Saudi 51 drones — LARGEST single-day barrage targeting kingdom. Kuwait airport drones. Jordan: 79/85 intercepted over week 2.
dailyRows.capability: 20+70. DRONE VOLUME TICKED UP — Saudi's 51-drone barrage a significant escalation. Kharg Island: 90+ military targets struck by CENTCOM (sparing oil). White House: ballistic ↓90%, drones ↓95%, 65+ vessels sunk.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $103.14 Fri close (CNBC). Fujairah oil hub fire from drone debris. IRGC declares UAE bases 'legitimate targets.' Trump 'not ready for deal.' May hit Kharg 'a few more times just for fun.'
dailyRows.assessment: Drone escalation despite missile depletion. Saudi barrage = Iran still has UAV stockpile. Kharg strike shows coalition restraint on oil — but for how long?

dailyRows.primary: Heaviest single-night bombardment since D1: Isfahan, Shiraz (20+ explosions), Tehran, Dezful, Khomein, Hamedan, Jask port. 6+ provinces. 10+ hypersonic missiles at Israel.
dailyRows.capability: 25+60. IRGC fires 10+ HYPERSONIC missiles at Israel — capability escalation. Israel critically low on ballistic interceptors (Semafor). IDF: 7,600+ strikes in Iran, 1,100+ in Lebanon cumul.
dailyRows.cost: 15+ killed Isfahan. Shiraz residential areas hit. 10,000+ homes destroyed (Tehran governor). 56 cultural sites damaged. Pope calls ceasefire. Pahlavi outlines transition. Houthis threaten Red Sea resumption.
dailyRows.assessment: Hypersonic escalation + interceptor crisis = war's most dangerous moment since D1. Houthi threat = potential second maritime chokepoint.

dailyRows.primary: Israel new Tehran strikes (smoke over capital). Dubai airport drone fire (flights suspended→limited). Abu Dhabi missile kill. Fujairah drone fire. Saudi 37 drones intercepted (AJ). Baghdad airport rockets. Israel: 245 attack waves total.
dailyRows.capability: DRONE VOLUME SURGED — Saudi 37 drones alone is highest single-day count from kingdom. IRGC claims most weapons cache intact and hasn't used post-2025 missiles yet. If true, Iran's offensive depth is much greater than ↓90% suggests. Israel planning 3+ more weeks of strikes.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $106+. Gulf exports ↓61% (Reuters/Kpler). US wounded revised to ~200. Hormuz coalition failing — Australia, Japan, Germany all declined. G5 'gravely concerned' re Lebanon. Trump threatens NATO umbrella + Xi summit.
dailyRows.assessment: IRGC 'arsenal intact' claim is the most significant D17 development. If true, Iran has been deliberately rationing — using old stock while preserving modern missiles. This reframes the entire attrition narrative. War may have much longer tail than assumed.

dailyRows.primary: DECAPITATION: Larijani + Soleimani confirmed killed. UAE full airspace closure. Qatar 13/14 ballistic intercepted. Saudi 12+ drones. Baghdad Al-Rasheed Hotel + embassy targeted. Abu Dhabi 1 killed. Tanker struck off Fujairah. Israel ground invasion of Lebanon.
dailyRows.capability: Decapitation accelerating but Qatar 13/14 ballistic missiles = Iran still has meaningful ballistic capability. IRGC 'cache intact' claim from D16 gaining credibility. Israel ground ops in Lebanon = second full front.
dailyRows.cost: Joe Kent (NCTC director) resigned — 'Iran not a threat.' Trump: don't need NATO. Delayed China trip 1 month. France: 'never' Hormuz during war. Amnesty: 170+ schoolgirls killed in US strike.
dailyRows.assessment: Crosscurrents: Military decapitation vs economic leverage. Israel destroying command structure but Iran's remaining capability + Hormuz control = strategic stalemate. First tanker transit could signal beginning of negotiated passage framework.

dailyRows.primary: ENERGY + NUCLEAR WAR: Israel struck South Pars (AM). Iran hit Ras Laffan LNG TWICE (PM). Bushehr NPP 'hostile projectile' (IAEA: no reactor damage, Rosatom suspended construction). 5th senior kill (Basij head + Khatib). Kuwait 4 ballistic + 20 drones. Multi-warhead at Israel (2 killed). Saudi 4 ballistic at Riyadh DURING FM meeting + drone at gas facility.
dailyRows.capability: ENERGY WAR FULLY MUTUAL + NUCLEAR DIMENSION. Ras Laffan x2, South Pars, Bushehr NPP all hit in single day. Iran named specific Gulf targets (Samref, Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn). Multi-warhead Khorramshahr-4 + Qadr. Israel striking northern Iran. D19 missile count REVISED UP from 35→40 on 2nd Ras Laffan confirmation.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $107.38 close (CNBC), spiked $111+ after-hours. Gas $3.84 (+29%). Fed held rates. Pentagon $200B+. Qatar expelled attaches. Saudi: 'right to military action.' 12 FM joint statement. E3 backing military defense. Hengaw: 5,300 dead. Lebanon 880+. Kataib Hezbollah conditional pause. IMO emergency meeting.
dailyRows.assessment: INFLECTION: Energy + nuclear. Bushehr projectile = nuclear-adjacent escalation. Ras Laffan x2 = Qatar's LNG industry threatened. E3 military backing + 12 FM statement + Saudi warning = diplomatic momentum toward intervention OR escalation. Kataib Hezbollah pause offer = first crack in Iran proxy unity. IMO corridor = international shipping institutions mobilizing. Every constraint dissolving simultaneously.

dailyRows.primary: SAMREF HIT + ENERGY WAR CONTINUES: Kuwait TWO refineries ablaze (Mina al-Ahmadi + Mina Abdullah). QatarEnergy: 'several' LNG facilities. SAMREF refinery (Yanbu, Red Sea) hit by drone — IRGC named target EXECUTED. 6th salvo at Israel. Kuwait 4 ballistic + 25+ drones. Saudi Al-Kharj 2 killed. Gabbard contradicts Trump. IAEA: 440kg = ~10 weapons. Bandar Anzali heavy bombardment.
dailyRows.capability: D20 REVISED: 45 missiles + 80 drones. SAMREF = FIRST Red Sea coast target. IRGC executing named target list: Kuwait ✓ Qatar ✓ SAMREF ✓. Remaining: Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn. 6 salvos at Israel since midnight = maintaining pressure. CENTCOM: 7,800+ targets. Bandar Anzali warships destroyed.
dailyRows.cost: Brent surged $119.11 intraday (CNBC), settled ~$114 close. Citi: $120+. SAMREF 'impact minimal' per Aramco but symbolic significance enormous — Red Sea coast reached. Gabbard contradicts Trump. Kent FBI probe. Saudi FM 'trust shattered.' Pezeshkian resignation crisis. Swedish execution. Pentagon $200B+.
dailyRows.assessment: SAMREF is the inflection within the inflection. IRGC's named targets are being systematically executed. Red Sea coast = drones can reach Saudi Arabia's western export infrastructure, not just Gulf-facing facilities. This means pipeline bypass routes (East-West Pipeline to Yanbu) are no longer safe. The energy war has NO geographic limit within Saudi Arabia. Combined with Kuwait refineries + Qatar LNG = comprehensive assault on Gulf energy architecture.

dailyRows.primary: NOWRUZ — DAY 21 + CHAHARSHANBE SURI DEFIANCE + OMAN EXPANSION: Chaharshanbe Suri turned 'Night of Defiance' — nationwide protests. 111 pro-monarchy cells arrested in 26/31 provinces. 'Death to Mojtaba' chants. NEW: Oman ports (Duqm, Salalah) hit by drones — first strikes on neutral Oman. Mojtaba STILL not seen — only written statements. Pahlavi solidarity call. Macron energy moratorium. Trump South Pars trigger. Rafah crossing reopened. 200+ Ukrainian anti-drone experts deployed to Gulf.
dailyRows.capability: D21 REVISED UP: 40+72 (Oman added). NOWRUZ does NOT pause IRGC operations. Oman = 9th country targeted. IRGC now attacking NEUTRAL states. Target execution: 4 of 7 named targets. Iran FM rejects all diplomacy permanently. Mojtaba absent from Nowruz message = power vacuum confirmed. 200+ Ukrainian experts = new defensive capability for Gulf.
dailyRows.cost: Brent ~$110 (pullback from $114/$119 spike). Chaharshanbe Suri defiance = IRGC facing INTERNAL front for first time since war began. 111 arrests = massive security operation diverts resources from war. Carnegie: largest uprising potential since 1979. 3.2M displaced. Internet ~270+ hrs. Oman ports = alternative shipping route threatened. Macron energy moratorium = diplomatic track. Trump South Pars trigger active.
dailyRows.assessment: NOWRUZ PARADOX REALIZED: Chaharshanbe Suri defiance confirms the prediction — Nowruz gatherings HAVE become protests. IRGC now fighting on TWO FRONTS: external war + internal dissent. 111 arrests across 26 provinces = nationwide, not localized. Oman strikes = war expanding to neutral states, alienating even non-aligned countries. Mojtaba's continued absence on Nowruz = succession crisis confirmed. The convergence of external war, internal revolt, leadership vacuum, and geographic expansion is unprecedented. If post-Nowruz protests escalate: IRGC must choose between war effort and regime survival.

timeline.title: Week 3 (Mar 16–22)
timeline.body: IRGC EXECUTING TARGET LIST + CHAHARSHANBE SURI DEFIANCE: Named targets hit systematically — Kuwait 2 refineries ✓, Qatar LNG ✓, SAMREF (Yanbu, Red Sea) ✓. NEW: Oman ports (Duqm, Salalah) hit. Brent $107→$119→$110. NOWRUZ under fire — Chaharshanbe Suri turned 'Night of Defiance.' 111 arrests in 26/31 provinces. 'Death to Mojtaba' chants. Carnegie: 1979 potential. Mojtaba STILL not seen. Iran FM: 'never asked for ceasefire.' Macron energy moratorium. Trump South Pars trigger. 200+ Ukrainian anti-drone experts. Selective Hormuz: China/India/Turkey. 3.2M Iranians displaced.

timeline.title: Week 4–5 (Mar 23–Apr 5)
timeline.body: IRGC remaining targets = critical: Jubail (world's largest industrial city), Mesaieed (Qatar petrochemicals), Al Hosn (UAE gas). If struck: Brent $130+, Saudi military entry triggered, total Gulf shutdown. POST-NOWRUZ PROTESTS = key variable. If Chaharshanbe Suri defiance escalates: IRGC faces two-front crisis. Mojtaba's continued absence = succession unresolved. Ukrainian anti-drone deployment: does it shift Gulf defense balance? Selective Hormuz passage: does it evolve into formal framework or collapse? Congress $200B+ supplemental fight.

timeline.title: Month 2 (Apr–May)
timeline.body: Three crises converge: (1) Energy — IRGC target execution vs improved Gulf defenses (Ukrainian experts) + Macron moratorium; (2) Nuclear — Isfahan underground + IAEA locked out = breakout window; (3) Internal — post-Nowruz protest wave + succession crisis + IRGC two-front strain. US missile supply becomes binding constraint. Hormuz permission-based framework either formalizes (China/India corridor) or collapses.

timeline.title: Month 3+ (May onward)
timeline.body: If IRGC completes target list: permanent regional restructuring. Saudi entry = wider war. If post-Nowruz internal pressure sustains: IRGC faces existential two-front challenge. Nuclear verification crisis defines decade. Oman neutrality violated = regional alignment shifts. No clean outcome available.

timeline.title: Endgame variables
timeline.body: IRGC remaining targets (Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn). Post-Nowruz protest trajectory. Saudi military entry decision. Mojtaba's condition / succession. Ukrainian anti-drone impact. Selective Hormuz evolution. Macron energy moratorium. Trump South Pars trigger. US missile resupply. Isfahan nuclear. Congress $200B+. Lebanon Litani. Oman neutrality.

timeline_fa.title: هفته ۳ (۱۶–۲۲ مارس)
timeline_fa.body: سپاه لیست + چهارشنبه‌سوری نافرمانی. کویت ✓ قطر ✓ سامرف ✓. عمان حمله. نفت ۱۰۷→۱۱۹→۱۱۰. ۱۱۱ بازداشت. 'مرگ بر مجتبی.' کارنگی: ۱۹۷۹. مجتبی غایب. اوکراین ۲۰۰+ متخصص. هرمز گزینشی. ۳.۲ میلیون آواره.

timeline_fa.title: هفته ۴–۵
timeline_fa.body: جبیل، مسیعید، الحصن = حیاتی. نوروز بعد: اعتراض ادامه؟ سپاه دو جبهه. مجتبی: جانشینی حل‌نشده. اوکراین: تعادل دفاعی؟ هرمز رسمی یا فروپاشی. کنگره ۲۰۰+.

timeline_fa.title: ماه ۲
timeline_fa.body: انرژی + هسته‌ای + داخلی. نوروز بعد + بحران جانشینی + سپاه دو جبهه. موشک آمریکا محدود. هرمز: چین/هند کریدور.

timeline_fa.title: ماه ۳+
timeline_fa.body: سپاه لیست کامل = بازسازی دائمی. نوروز بعد = فشار. عمان بی‌طرفی = تحول. هسته‌ای دهه.

timeline_fa.title: متغیرهای پایانی
timeline_fa.body: جبیل، مسیعید، الحصن. نوروز بعد اعتراض. عربستان. مجتبی. اوکراین دفاع. هرمز. ماکرون. ترامپ پارس جنوبی. موشک. اصفهان. کنگره. لبنان. عمان.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Escalation spiral / total war
scenarioProbabilities.body: DECREASED from 47%. Chaharshanbe Suri defiance = IRGC must divert resources to internal front. 111 arrests in 26 provinces = massive security demand. BUT: Oman strikes = war STILL expanding geographically. 4 of 7 named targets hit. If Jubail/Mesaieed/Al Hosn struck: Brent $130+, Saudi entry. Trump South Pars trigger = next Qatar attack → US destroys field. Iran FM permanently rejects ceasefire. INTERNAL pressure may slightly slow IRGC's external escalation — hence small decrease.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Protracted attrition + internal crisis
scenarioProbabilities.body: INCREASED from 18%. Chaharshanbe Suri defiance is the KEY change — IRGC now facing TWO FRONTS. If post-Nowruz protests sustain: war effort degrades. 111 arrests = security resources diverted. Selective Hormuz passage = partial economic normalization possible. Ukrainian anti-drone experts = Gulf defenses improving. Attrition becomes more likely if IRGC's capacity is split between external war and internal control. This is the 'slow grind' scenario where neither side achieves decisive outcome.

scenarioProbabilities.name: International intervention / ceasefire
scenarioProbabilities.body: INCREASED from 14%. Macron energy moratorium + IMO corridor vote + Oman neutrality violated + selective Hormuz passage = multiple diplomatic frameworks emerging. Oman strike may ACCELERATE international response — attacking neutral states crosses new red line. BUT: Iran FM 'never asked for ceasefire' + IRGC dictatorship = no Iranian partner. Most likely form: maritime corridor OR energy moratorium imposed on one side.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Declared victory + exit
scenarioProbabilities.body: DECREASED from 14%. Oman expansion + internal defiance = war visibly WIDENING on all dimensions. Exit narrative has zero credibility while IRGC targets neutral states and protests erupt internally. Kent resignation + 'no intelligence' claim undermines legitimacy. Only path: Trump unilateral declaration ignoring reality — becomes more plausible as political pressure mounts from $200B+ cost and rising casualties.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Regime fracture / IRGC two-front crisis
scenarioProbabilities.body: INCREASED from 5%. CHAHARSHANBE SURI IS THE TRIGGER. Nationwide defiance despite massive security deployment. 111 arrests in 26/31 provinces = protests are NATIONAL, not localized. 'Death to Mojtaba' = rejection of succession. Carnegie: largest uprising potential since 1979. Mojtaba still absent. If post-Nowruz protests sustain: IRGC must choose between war effort and regime survival. 3.2M displaced + internet blackout + bombing = population is angry, not broken. Ukrainian drone experts weakening IRGC's external capability. CONVERGENCE of all pressure points.

scenarioProbabilities.name: Negotiated deal
scenarioProbabilities.body: UNCHANGED. Araghchi: 'never asked for ceasefire, never asked for negotiation.' Definitive. IRGC dictatorship = no civilian partner. Selective Hormuz passage (China/India/Turkey) = backdoor partial normalization without formal deal. Most likely 'deal' is de facto: selective passage + energy moratorium + informal ceasefire — without any formal agreement.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: مارپیچ تشدید / جنگ تمام‌عیار
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: کاهش جزئی. چهارشنبه‌سوری = دو جبهه. اما عمان = گسترش. ۴ از ۷. جبیل = ۱۳۰+.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: فرسایشی + بحران داخلی
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: افزایش. نافرمانی = سپاه دو جبهه. هرمز گزینشی. اوکراین دفاع.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: مداخله بین‌المللی
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: افزایش. ماکرون + IMO + عمان بی‌طرفی = خط قرمز جدید.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: اعلام پیروزی + خروج
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: کاهش. عمان + نافرمانی = گسترش. کنت: 'اطلاعاتی نبود.'

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: شکست رژیم / دو جبهه
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: افزایش. چهارشنبه‌سوری = ماشه. ۱۱۱ بازداشت. 'مرگ بر مجتبی.' کارنگی: ۱۹۷۹. ۳.۲ میلیون.

scenarioProbabilities_fa.name: مذاکره
scenarioProbabilities_fa.body: عراقچی: 'هرگز.' هرمز گزینشی = عملی بدون رسمی.

theoryEvaluation.title: CHAHARSHANBE SURI DEFIANCE — IRGC now fighting on two fronts
theoryEvaluation.body: The Nowruz paradox predicted in D20 analysis has been CONFIRMED. Chaharshanbe Suri (fire festival) turned into nationwide protest despite massive IRGC security deployment. 111 'pro-monarchy cells' arrested in 26 of 31 provinces = protests are NATIONAL, not urban-only. 'Death to Mojtaba' chants = population rejecting hereditary succession. Carnegie Endowment assessment: largest potential uprising since 1979 revolution. CRITICAL IMPLICATION: IRGC must now allocate security forces to BOTH external war AND internal dissent. This is the scenario most analysts feared — a two-front crisis where the regime cannot concentrate resources. If post-Nowruz protests sustain over the following days and weeks, IRGC's capacity to execute remaining named targets (Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn) may be degraded. However, IRGC has historically shown willingness to brutalize domestic opposition — the question is whether it can do this while simultaneously fighting a multi-theater external war with degraded command structure (5 senior officials killed, Mojtaba incapacitated).

theoryEvaluation.title: Oman expansion — war beyond belligerents
theoryEvaluation.body: Drone strikes on Oman's Duqm and Salalah ports represent a QUALITATIVE expansion. Oman has been neutral throughout the conflict — it hosted pre-war diplomacy and the Feb 27 'breakthrough.' Attacking neutral Oman: (1) alienates the only Gulf state that maintained a channel to Iran, (2) threatens alternative shipping routes (Duqm and Salalah were being used as bypass hubs), (3) demonstrates IRGC willingness to attack ANY infrastructure, regardless of political alignment. Combined with the Bahrain-Saudi bridge damage, this means every maritime and pipeline route in the region is now at risk. The war has expanded from Gulf + Red Sea + Caspian to include Oman Sea = effectively ALL of Iran's surrounding maritime space. Geographic containment of the conflict is failing.

theoryEvaluation.title: Selective Hormuz passage — de facto framework emerging
theoryEvaluation.body: A permission-based Hormuz transit framework is crystallizing without formal agreement. China, India, Pakistan, and Turkey have all negotiated bilateral passage with Iran. March 16: only 2 crossings (97% below normal), but these crossings are POLITICALLY meaningful. Iran continues exporting 16M+ barrels to China via selective passage + Kooh Mobarak bypass. ~400 vessels waiting in Gulf of Oman = massive pressure for framework expansion. This creates a two-tier system: Iran's trade partners get passage, US-aligned nations blocked. Implications: (1) Hormuz 'closure' is actually SELECTIVE BLOCKADE, (2) China becomes gatekeeper for Gulf access, (3) US alliance leverage eroded as individual nations negotiate bilaterally. The Macron moratorium and IMO corridor vote could formalize this into an international framework — but Iran's total rejection of diplomacy makes formal agreement impossible.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: چهارشنبه‌سوری: سپاه دو جبهه
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: پارادوکس نوروز تأیید شد. ۱۱۱ بازداشت ۲۶ استان = ملی. 'مرگ بر مجتبی.' کارنگی: ۱۹۷۹. سپاه: جنگ خارجی + سرکوب داخلی. اگر ادامه: ظرفیت جبیل/الحصن کاهش. اما سابقه خشونت.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: عمان: جنگ فراتر از طرفین
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: دقم + صلاله = بی‌طرف حمله. عمان = کانال دیپلماتیک بود. مسیرهای جایگزین تهدید. خلیج + دریای سرخ + خزر + عمان = همه فضای دریایی.

theoryEvaluation_fa.title: هرمز گزینشی: چارچوب عملی
theoryEvaluation_fa.body: چین، هند، ترکیه = عبور. ۱۶+ میلیون بشکه به چین. ۴۰۰ کشتی منتظر. دو سطحی: شرکای ایران عبور، متحدان آمریکا نه. چین = دروازه‌بان.

endstate.title: Most likely (45%)
endstate.body: Escalation spiral — SLIGHTLY DECREASED. Chaharshanbe Suri defiance = IRGC now fighting two fronts. Internal protests may slow external target execution. BUT: Oman strikes = war still expanding. 4 of 7 named targets hit. If Jubail/Al Hosn next: total Gulf shutdown, $130+ oil, Saudi entry. Iran permanently rejects diplomacy. Trump South Pars trigger. Key question: can IRGC manage TWO FRONTS simultaneously with degraded command structure?

endstate.title: Second (22%)
endstate.body: Protracted attrition + internal crisis — INCREASED. Chaharshanbe Suri changed the game. If post-Nowruz protests sustain: IRGC capacity split. Selective Hormuz passage = partial economic normalization. Ukrainian anti-drone experts = Gulf defenses improving. Two-front strain + degraded leadership + selective passage = war enters long grinding phase without decisive outcome from either side.

endstate.title: Emerging (15%)
endstate.body: International intervention. Oman neutrality violated = new red line. Macron moratorium + IMO corridor + selective Hormuz = multiple frameworks. Global urgency at $110+ oil. But: no Iranian partner. Most likely: unilateral maritime corridor OR energy moratorium. Oman attack may accelerate diplomatic action.

endstate.title: Wild card (8%)
endstate.body: Regime fracture. Chaharshanbe Suri = trigger. 111 arrests in 26 provinces = national movement. Carnegie: 1979. If post-Nowruz sustains: IRGC existential choice — war or regime survival. Mojtaba absent = no authority. 3.2M displaced = population base for sustained protest. OR: IRGC hits all remaining targets simultaneously = oil $150+, total regional shutdown, Saudi entry = maximum escalation.

endstate_fa.title: محتمل‌ترین (۴۵٪)
endstate_fa.body: مارپیچ تشدید — کاهش جزئی. چهارشنبه‌سوری = دو جبهه. عمان = گسترش. ۴ از ۷. جبیل؟ سؤال: سپاه دو جبهه + فرماندهی ضعیف = توان؟

endstate_fa.title: دوم (۲۲٪)
endstate_fa.body: فرسایشی + بحران داخلی — افزایش. نوروز بعد: ادامه؟ هرمز گزینشی. اوکراین دفاع. سایش طولانی.

endstate_fa.title: نوظهور (۱۵٪)
endstate_fa.body: مداخله. عمان بی‌طرفی = خط قرمز. ماکرون + IMO. اما بدون شریک ایرانی.

endstate_fa.title: غیرمنتظره (۸٪)
endstate_fa.body: شکست رژیم. چهارشنبه‌سوری = ماشه. کارنگی: ۱۹۷۹. نوروز بعد = انتخاب سپاه. یا: همه اهداف = ۱۵۰+.

shippingRoutes.detail: Unchanged. IRGC executing target list + now hitting NEUTRAL Oman. UAE at risk (Al Hosn on list). Qatar Airways suspended. Route permanently dead.
shippingRoutes.eta: N/A — route permanently disrupted for duration of conflict

shippingRoutes.detail: Closed. NATO intercepted missiles over Turkey. Turkey negotiated selective Hormuz passage for own ships — but Turkey-Iran land border still shut. Swedish execution + Chaharshanbe Suri = no improvement.
shippingRoutes.eta: Not viable until conflict ends + diplomatic normalization

shippingRoutes.detail: Still most viable but FURTHER DECLINING. Bandar Anzali heavy bombardment + Caspian strikes. NOWRUZ + Chaharshanbe Suri defiance = internal disruption. 111 arrests in 26 provinces = security forces diverted. IRGC managing two fronts = civilian logistics further subordinated. Internet ~270+ hrs. 3.2M displaced = population movement chaotic. Strikes in all 25 provinces.
Eastern borders not in main combat zone. Pakistan negotiated selective Hormuz passage = some infrastructure functioning. But no direct route improvement. Assessment unchanged.
shippingRoutes.eta: Months to establish if even possible

shippingRoutes.detail: NEW ENTRY: Oman was emerging as bypass hub, but Duqm and Salalah ports now HIT by IRGC drones. Fuel storage damaged. Oman's neutrality violated. This route was being used by ships waiting in Gulf of Oman (~400 vessels). Now at risk.
shippingRoutes.eta: Uncertain — depends on whether Oman attacks escalate

shippingRoutes_fa.detail: بسته. ناتو. ترکیه هرمز = اما مرز نه.
بهترین اما کاهشی بیشتر. بندرانزلی + چهارشنبه‌سوری + ۱۱۱ بازداشت. ۳.۲ میلیون. ۲۷۰+.
جدید: عمان حمله شد. دقم + صلاله. بی‌طرفی نقض.

publishingStatus: Paper supply: CRITICAL. Hormuz closed + rial collapsed + IRGC two-front crisis. Nowruz publishing season completely lost.
Internet blackout: ~270+ hours (11+ days). 'A third of 2026 offline.' IRGC controls all channels. Chaharshanbe Suri defiance despite blackout = population using offline networks.
Power outages: WORSENING. CENTCOM: 7,800+ targets across 25 provinces. Energy infrastructure targeted on BOTH sides. 25 hospitals damaged, 9 out of service.
Isfahan + Shiraz: Both under sustained bombardment. Nowruz under fire = unprecedented cultural trauma. Chaharshanbe Suri defiance = cultural resilience.
56+ cultural sites damaged. 5,500+ estimated dead. 3.2M displaced. IRGC relocating to civilian spaces.
New title production: Effectively halted. Nowruz publishing season — normally peak — completely lost.
Assessment: Existential crisis. IRGC two-front (war + protests). Oman expansion. Iran FM: 'never.' Recovery: years minimum. Chaharshanbe Suri = hope signal for cultural survival.

تولید متوقف. نوروز = از دست رفته.
بحران. دو جبهه. عمان. 'هرگز.' سال‌ها. چهارشنبه‌سوری = امید.
impactIranfarhang: PRIMARY ROUTE DEAD: Tehran→Dubai→Atlanta completely non-functional. IRGC targeting neutral Oman now. No improvement possible.

BEST ALTERNATIVE DECLINING FURTHER: Armenia (Agarak/Norduz) — viability 8-12% (DOWN from 10-15%). Chaharshanbe Suri defiance + 111 arrests = internal disruption. IRGC two-front crisis = civilian logistics further subordinated. 3.2M displaced.
SUPPLY SOURCE CRITICAL: CENTCOM 7,800+ targets, 25 provinces. 5,500+ dead. Internet ~270+ hrs. Chaharshanbe Suri protests = population not broken but infrastructure destroyed.

OFAC STATUS: Informational materials exemption (31 CFR §560.210(c)) remains valid. IRGC dictatorship + Araghchi rejection = compliance pressure maximum. Kent resignation: 'no intelligence' = political context shifting.
FINANCIAL: Rial collapsed. Brent ~$110. Oman ports hit = alternative routes compromised. IRGC controls economy.
WINDOW CLOSED: IRGC executing targets + internal defiance. FM: 'never.' Nowruz lost. Plan for 12+ month total interruption. Chaharshanbe Suri = only hope sign for future cultural survival.
